questionHtml:
What material is formed when organic matter is not fully decomposed in acidic waterlogged soils?

A. Coal

B. Hydrogen

C. Oil

D. Peat

meta.title: What material is formed when organic matter is not fully decomposed in acidic waterlogged soils? A. Coal B. Hydrogen C. Oil D. Peat
